race.comment: VANGOGH BANKCHEQUE (5) looks very well placed here second up. He was heavily supported first up at Flemington in a handy race and found the line well behind a good horse in Legacy Bound having jumped out very well leading in. Comes back a notch or two here and will be very hard to hold out. AZZACOOL (8) has won two on the bounce at Seymour and Pakenham. She's fresh for this but progressing very nicely and can measure up again. SKETCH (12) resumes. She took on some good races last time in, albeit getting over a bit further towards the back end. Fancy she'll be sharp enough here with Lane booked. ALZARO (11) ran well fresh at Caulfield Heath and can improve off that but will need tempo to suit from a wide gate. STRUGGLE STREET (10) has won two on the bounce in easier company and could measure up.
